creator: alangrow+b9d2265c@gmail.com
text:
I've tracked it down to a failed pci_read_device() call during
cardbus_attach_card(). It seems we can't even read off the vendor id:

  db> s
  [thread pid 33 tid 100037 ]
  Stopped at      pcireg_cfgread+0x215:   inl     %dx,%eax
  db> s
  [thread pid 33 tid 100037 ]
  Stopped at      pcireg_cfgread+0x216:   movl    %eax,%ebx
  db> p $eax
    ffffffff
  db> p $edx
    cfc

Same problem on both 6.2 and -CURRENT. The machine is a Thinkpad T43 with
a TI1510 CardBus Bridge. Here's some more info.

$ pciconf -l
hostb0@pci0:0:0:	class=0x060000 card=0x05751014 chip=0x25908086 rev=0x03 hdr=0x00
